subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! We are handmaidens who have been drawn by the fragrances of Thy holiness from the blessed Spot. Illumine our inner vision with the lights of Thy guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: إلهی إلهی نحن اماء اجتذبتنا نفحات قدسک من البقعة المبارکة نور بصائرنا بانوار هدايتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @role and station of women, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
